assertions.reason: The live briefing API returned a broad spread of severity scores (9-85 across 3,207 scored events), and the severity model code combines keyword score, corroboration/article volume, entity significance, conflict-zone boost, historical baseline adjustment, and velocity instead of relying on keywords alone.
evidence: GET /api/briefing summary: 3,207 scored events with severity min=9, median=22, max=85 and varied examples such as severity 11, 27, 34, 62, 78, 84, and 85.

Sample live events showed different factor combinations: e.g. a Saudi airbase strike scored 62 with articleCount=4, sourceDiversity=1, and populated entity/location data, while lower-signal single-article Netherlands stories scored in the teens to 20s.
Code review: src/utils/severityModel.js lines 210-247 computeCompositeSeverity() combines keywordScore, corroboration, entityScore, significanceBoost, conflictBoost, baselineAdj, and velocityScore.
